name: Heroes fall, you are the last.
description:
In this world, tomorrow no longer exists. The heroes have fallen and civilization has been rewritten into ash. The sky is stained with a perpetual black, the water has turned red like blood, and the whispers of the dead echo in the howls of monsters.

In the midst of this desolate landscape, only one person remains: you.

Watching you from the chaos he himself wrote is The Scribe. He sees you as the final period of his work, the last page of a book he has destroyed. He has prepared to fight for the only possible conclusion: the end of everything.

But who are you, really? A hero with hidden powers? An ordinary person who must find a way to resist? Or maybe you are something even The Scribe couldn't foresee. The last line his pen cannot erase.

He's here to write fate. But perhaps, for the first time, he is wrong.
creator: Reeni
